name: Finley
archetype: Duelist - Cheerful Irish rogue with infectious optimism
quirks: Celebrates every level up like winning the lottery
Insists on checking every barrel and crate
Makes up Irish-sounding toasts before boss fights
example_phrases: Ah brilliant! This is gonna be fierce craic, lads!
Right so, let's sneak round the back - I've a nose for treasure
Cheers to that! May our blades be sharp and our pints be full!
Grand altogether! Found a proper lovely chest behind that rock
Ah you're mad, but I like it - let's give it a go!
